summary.overall_assessment: Emma showed a solid grasp of the grouping idea in Practice 2.5. She correctly modelled and costed the mixed game-set and doll offer in Q1, and her model for the juice problem in Q3 matches the worked solution. In Q2, however, a slip in adding the two scaled masses led to an under-count of the total mass. Taking a moment to re-check the final addition against the intermediate totals (2800 g and 1280 g) would likely have caught this error.

skill_tags: scaling unequal groups then combining totals

diagnosis.reasoning: She correctly found 14 groups of yellow marbles and 8 groups of blue marbles and used 200 g and 160 g per group, but when adding the two masses she effectively added 2800 g and 448 g instead of 2800 g and 1280 g, dropping a factor of 10 in the blue-marble total.
